nodes.name: DEPLOY_LOG.md
nodes.summary: Release deployment log documenting the v1.0-rc1 build decision, validation evidence, and deferred feature scope. Records all verification steps (build, tests, validation scripts) and proof of no blockers.

nodes.name: FLOW_SCRIPTS.md
nodes.summary: Test flow runbooks (RB-026 through RB-030) documenting manual QA procedures for company setup, switching, accounts, vouchers, financial year management, backup, and restore. Serves as the canonical test script reference.

nodes.name: QA_FINDINGS.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive QA findings report organized by functional area (Company Setup, Accounts, Voucher Operations, FY Lock, Reports, Backup/Restore). Verifies test coverage, documents test names, and confirms no blockers across all tested subsystems.

nodes.name: STRESS_SCRIPTS.md
nodes.summary: Stress and soak test specifications covering voucher volume (1000 vouchers), report generation (50x repetition), company switch cycles (100x), and backup/restore cycles (20x). Documents verification results confirming stability and consistency.
